Poop Clicker

Yes, we know it's a bit of a messy situation, but we need your plumbing skills! Play Poop Clicker, a free idle game with an odd twist; you get to be a dedicated plumber. Click on the poo-poo on the screen to earn fantastic rewards! While your friends dream of glamorous careers and having cool jobs like astronauts or athletes, you've chosen a different path for being a sewer guy!

Play Poop Clicker Online

Loading game...
About Poop Clicker

Yes, we know it's a bit of a messy situation, but we need your plumbing skills! Play Poop Clicker, a free idle game with an odd twist; you get to be a dedicated plumber. Click on the poo-poo on the screen to earn fantastic rewards! While your friends dream of glamorous careers and having cool jobs like astronauts or athletes, you've chosen a different path for being a sewer guy! This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Poop Clicker in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Clicker game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Poop Clicker for free?

Yes. Poop Clicker is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Poop Clicker?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
